stories.title: Takeaways: Thunder handle Lakers in Game 2 win
stories.summary: Here's what we've learned -- and what's next -- for the 76ers-Knicks, Cavs-Pistons, Wolves-Spurs and Lakers-Thunder series.

stories.title: OKC up 2-0 on Lakers as Holmgren, SGA score 22
stories.summary: Chet Holmgren and Shai Gilgeous-Alexander each scored 22 points and the Thunder beat the Lakers 125-107 on Thursday to take a 2-0 lead in the Western Conference semifinals.

stories.title: Vikings, Jennings agree to deal worth up to $13M
stories.summary: The Vikings agreed to terms with free agent receiver Jauan Jennings on a one-year deal worth up to $13 million, agent Drew Rosenhaus told ESPN.

stories.title: Cunningham, Pistons pull away, take G2 vs. Cavs
stories.summary: Cade Cunningham and the Pistons, whose season was on the ropes less than a week ago, aren't going to let up against the Cavaliers.

stories.title: Flyers on brink after penalties pile up in G3 loss...
stories.summary: The Flyers were frustrated by the officiating, the Hurricanes' penalty kill and their own mistakes in a Game 3 loss Thursday night that put them on the brink of elimination.
